_schemaDescription: Risk Assessment – Heat Map sample payload. Universe-level view: 12 entities total, 10 scored. Color zones: Red/High Risk (7 entities), Yellow/Medium Risk (3 entities). 2 entities unscored. Green zone absent as per 'universe-red-dominant' variation. Color names and classification labels are client-configured — not hardcoded.

_drillDownExamples.universe: This payload (all entities in audit universe)
_drillDownExamples.entity: If user clicks 'Global Operations' → viewContext.currentLevel becomes 'entity', itemType becomes 'layer', contextPath becomes 'Global Operations', colorDistribution shows layers of Global Operations
_drillDownExamples.layer: If user clicks 'Supply Chain Layer' → itemType becomes 'process', contextPath becomes 'Global Operations > Supply Chain Layer'
_drillDownExamples.process: If user clicks 'Supplier Management' → itemType becomes 'risk', contextPath becomes 'Global Operations > Supply Chain Layer > Supplier Management'

colorDistribution.description: 10 scored entities: 7 Red (High Risk), 3 Yellow (Medium Risk). 2 entities unscored.

priorityItems.description: Top 3 entities by residual score requiring immediate audit attention.
